files.ranges_format: uint64_t n; struct { uint32_t adsh; uint64_t lo; uint64_t hi; }[n]

storage_extensions.usage: mmap ranges.bin; for each sub row with fy=2022, binary-search adsh and scan [lo,hi) fact rows directly to avoid global fact scan or posting-tail materialization

join_order.notes: Drive from filtered sub keys and touch only adsh-matching fact slices; apply n.uom='USD' and n.value IS NOT NULL in-range

data_structures.aggregation: thread_local direct_array(filtered_sub_cardinality) then compact_hash_map rollup for (name,cik) and cik

optimization_notes: Root cause is wasted work in the previous direction: build_joins became dominant by materializing USD rowids from a cache-exceeding posting tail before any selective join. Strategy Category A/C: reorder to filter sub by fy first, then use the existing num.adsh.triple_ranges representation to scan only fact ranges for matching adsh keys and apply uom/value predicates inside those ranges; keep aggregation as cache-friendly direct arrays with a small final rollup for HAVING and top-k.
